products.title: Minimal watch
products.desc: Slim 40mm stainless steel case with a brushed sunray dial and genuine leather strap. Water-resistant to 50 meters, scratch-resistant mineral crystal, and a reliable quartz movement — designed for daily wear from the office to the weekend.

products.title: Wireless headphones
products.desc: Premium over-ear headphones with hybrid active noise cancellation and up to 30 hours of battery life. Memory-foam ear cushions, fold-flat hinges for travel, USB-C fast charging, and a balanced sound profile tuned for music, podcasts, and voice calls.

products.title: Running shoes
products.desc: Breathable engineered mesh upper with a responsive foam midsole and durable rubber outsole. Lightweight cushioning for road runs, gym sessions, and long days on your feet; runs true to size with a secure heel lock.
